use_cases: Displaying hierarchical data structures like org charts or file systems
Visualizing nested relationships in taxonomies or category trees
Interactive data exploration with expand/collapse node functionality
Showing dependency graphs or project structure hierarchies
Representing any tree-based data with interactive node drilling
ai_summary: A hierarchical tree chart component built with @visx that renders interactive node-link diagrams in radial, horizontal, or vertical layouts. Features click-to-expand nodes with customizable link types (step, line, curve) and a dark theme with vibrant accent colors. Ideal for visualizing organizational structures, file systems, taxonomies, and nested data relationships in data-driven applications.
